notes: Frasier-Magician action deck. The base verbs are MAKER ones (DRAFT / BURN / RECORD / TUNE / BUILD / SHOW / COLLAGE / TRANSMIT) — Frasier hosts and makes, where John waits and serves. The TABLEAU buy pool is DEMONS: programs scoped to a domain space, bought only at that domain, each one a tradeoff (Stagnation tick / Doubt tick / sacrificed draft) for a strong one-shot effect. Engine support for STAGNATION + DOUBT + INSPIRATION + WIP progress + steamboat completion arc is pending the next commit; this file declares the verbs the engine will need to handle.

cards.title: DRAFT
cards.flavor: Write three lines on the back of an index card. The piece you're at advances by a beat. The room exhales.

cards.title: BURN
cards.flavor: Strike the match. Hold the index card by its corner. The room asks if you're sure. You're sure. The next thing the room was going to do doesn't happen.

cards.title: RECORD
cards.flavor: Microphone on the workbench. You don't need to say anything yet. The cassette will hold the room.

cards.title: TUNE
cards.flavor: Phosphor green. Tune the BBS until the noise has a shape. The next three things the room was going to say become legible.

cards.title: BUILD
cards.flavor: Spend the inspiration. Open a door that has been sealed since you moved in.

cards.title: SHOW
cards.flavor: Lift the cloth. Let them see what you've been doing. It's an offering. They take it.

cards.title: COLLAGE
cards.flavor: Three small things you found over the week. They want to be the same piece. You let them.

cards.title: TRANSMIT
cards.flavor: Send it to the diner. Set a flag the next time the gauntlet runs there. Frasier was thinking about you. You will feel it.

cards.title: STEP TOWARD
cards.flavor: Pick a door. Move one foot.

cards.title: PICK UP
cards.flavor: Wrap your fingers around it.

cards.title: LEAP
cards.flavor: One foot off the cliff. The other already.

cards.title: LIGHT THE CANDLES
cards.flavor: Get the cake from the fridge. Walk it to the workbench. Strike the match. Don't drop the match.

cards.title: DEMON · VAGRANT
cards.flavor: He shows you what's coming up the road. He doesn't ask for much.
ambient_lines: Vagrant trots back to the bay with one ear up. He has been outside.
Vagrant whines once at something only he heard.
Vagrant sits, panting. The CRT muzzle blinks once.

cards.title: DEMON · CICADA
cards.flavor: She records what you do while you do other things. You will not always like what the tape has.
ambient_lines: Cicada records two seconds of your breath. The reel doesn't move when you watch it.
Cicada's wings unfold like cassette spools and rewind without sound.
Cicada is humming a tone you put into a draft yesterday.

cards.title: DEMON · MOTH
cards.flavor: She is pulled to the brightest piece. She will claim a visitor for you, but at a cost.
ambient_lines: Moth circles the TOWER neon model.
Moth bumps the workbench lamp. The lamp doesn't flicker.
Moth is on the JUDGEMENT platform. Brightest thing in the room.

cards.title: DEMON · STEAMBOAT
cards.flavor: The whole game is whether you call this. He will finish the model for you. He will not stop at one beat.
ambient_lines: Steamboat smokestack curls a half-inch of paper smoke. None of the paper is gone.
Steamboat's paddle wheel turns one click. None of the brass moved.
Steamboat is in your peripheral vision, painted brighter than it was.

cards.title: DEMON · WEIR
cards.flavor: She locks the river behind you so the door doesn't close while you work.
ambient_lines: Weir's water-form holds steady against the river-window.
Weir adjusts the sluice. The river outside moves a half-second slower.
Weir doesn't speak. The window doesn't close.

cards.title: DEMON · FILLY
cards.flavor: She runs the cul-de-sac. While she's here, every Harmony Creek piece is one beat from finished.
ambient_lines: Filly does one slow lap of the Harmony Creek cul-de-sac.
Filly's wheels click softly against foam-core.
Filly stops outside Identical House #7. Looks up at the painted window.

cards.title: DEMON · STARLING
cards.flavor: She makes the call to the city you've never been to. Someone there hears you thinking about them.
ambient_lines: Starling perches on the pewter Saint-Laurent. Facing south.
Starling drops a black-paper letter on the Montreal model.
Starling's three birds spread, one to each WIP model.

cards.title: DEMON · HUSK
cards.flavor: He eats a draft. He shows you five of the room's next moves in exchange.
ambient_lines: Husk consumes the blank space inside a folded napkin.
Husk's five candles are lower than they were.
Husk's frame is dimmer. Something it ate is still digesting.
